member.name: T:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder
member.summary: A fluent builder for constructing and sending OpenRouter chat completion requests. Provides methods to configure all parameters supported by the OpenRouter API.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.#ctor(OpenRouterClient.Services.ServiceOrchestrator)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The service orchestrator instance used for sending requests.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.WithModel(System.String)
member.summary: Specifies the model to use for the completion.
member.param: The model ID (e.g., "openrouter/auto" or specific model name).
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.AddMessage(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a message to the conversation history.
member.param: The role of the message sender ("system", "user", or "assistant").
The content of the message.
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.AddUserMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a user message to the conversation history.
member.param: The content of the user message.
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.AddAssistantMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Adds an assistant message to the conversation history.
member.param: The content of the assistant message.
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.AddSystemMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a system message to the conversation history.
member.param: The content of the system message.
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.WithMaxTokens(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the maximum number of tokens to generate in the completion.
member.param: Maximum tokens (range: [1, context_length]).
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.WithTemperature(System.Double)
member.summary: Sets the sampling temperature for more creative/random outputs.
member.param: Value between 0 and 2. Higher values = more random.
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.WithSeed(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the random seed for deterministic outputs.
member.param: The seed value for random generation.
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.WithTopP(System.Double)
member.summary: Sets top-p (nucleus) sampling parameter.
member.param: Value between 0 and 1. Lower values = more focused outputs.
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.WithTopK(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets top-k sampling parameter.
member.param: Number of highest probability tokens to consider (range: [1, ∞)).
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.WithMinP(System.Double)
member.summary: Sets minimum probability threshold for token selection.
member.param: Value between 0 and 1.
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.WithTopA(System.Double)
member.summary: Sets top-a sampling parameter (alternative to top-p/top-k).
member.param: Value between 0 and 1.
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.WithFrequencyPenalty(System.Double)
member.summary: Sets frequency penalty to reduce repetition of tokens.
member.param: Value between -2 and 2.
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.WithPresencePenalty(System.Double)
member.summary: Sets presence penalty to encourage new topics.
member.param: Value between -2 and 2.
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.WithRepetitionPenalty(System.Double)
member.summary: Sets repetition penalty to control token repetition.
member.param: Value between 0 and 2.
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.WithLogitBias(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Double})
member.summary: Sets logit bias for specific tokens.
member.param: Dictionary mapping token IDs to bias values.
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.WithTopLogprobs(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets number of top log probabilities to return.
member.param: Number of logprobs to return.
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.WithStreaming(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Enables or disables streaming of partial results.
member.param: True to enable streaming (default: true).
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.WithTransforms(System.String[])
member.summary: Sets prompt transforms (OpenRouter-specific).
member.param: List of transform names.
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.WithModelRouting(System.String[])
member.summary: Sets alternative models for routing overrides.
member.param: List of alternative model IDs.
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.WithSortPreference(System.String)
member.summary: Sets model sorting preference.
member.param: Sort preference (e.g., "price", "throughput").
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.WithReasoning(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Configures reasoning/thinking tokens.
member.param: Effort level ("high", "medium", "low").
Max tokens for reasoning.
Whether to exclude reasoning from response.
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.WithUser(System.String)
member.summary: Sets user identifier for monitoring.
member.param: Unique user identifier.
member.returns: The builder instance for method chaining.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.SendAsync
member.summary: Sends the constructed request to OpenRouter and returns the response.
member.returns: The completion response or null if failed.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Builders.ChatCompletionRequestBuilder.Build
member.summary: Returns the configured request object without sending it.
member.returns: The fully configured OpenRouterRequestDto.

member.name: T:OpenRouterClient.DTO.Request.MessageDto
member.summary: Represents a message in the OpenRouter conversation.

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.Request.MessageDto.Role
member.summary: The role of the message sender. Must be 'system', 'user', or 'assistant'.

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.Request.MessageDto.Content
member.summary: The content of the message.

member.name: T:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterRequestDto
member.summary: Represents a request to the OpenRouter API for generating completions or chat-based responses.

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterRequestDto.Model
member.summary: Required. The model ID to use. If unspecified, the user's default is used.

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterRequestDto.Messages
member.summary: Required. List of message objects describing the conversation.

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterRequestDto.Stream
member.summary: Optional. Enable streaming of results. Defaults to false.

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterRequestDto.MaxTokens
member.summary: Optional. Maximum number of tokens to generate (range: [1, context_length)).

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterRequestDto.Temperature
member.summary: Optional. Sampling temperature (range: [0, 2]).

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterRequestDto.Seed
member.summary: Optional. Seed for deterministic outputs.

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterRequestDto.TopP
member.summary: Optional. Top-p sampling value (range: (0, 1]).

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterRequestDto.TopK
member.summary: Optional. Top-k sampling value (range: [1, Infinity)).

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterRequestDto.FrequencyPenalty
member.summary: Optional. Frequency penalty (range: [-2, 2]).

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterRequestDto.PresencePenalty
member.summary: Optional. Presence penalty (range: [-2, 2]).

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterRequestDto.RepetitionPenalty
member.summary: Optional. Repetition penalty (range: (0, 2]).

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterRequestDto.LogitBias
member.summary: Optional. Mapping of token IDs to bias values.

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterRequestDto.TopLogprobs
member.summary: Optional. Number of top log probabilities to return.

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterRequestDto.MinP
member.summary: Optional. Minimum probability threshold (range: [0, 1]).

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterRequestDto.TopA
member.summary: Optional. Alternate top sampling parameter (range: [0, 1]).

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterRequestDto.Transforms
member.summary: Optional. List of prompt transforms (OpenRouter-only).

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterRequestDto.Models
member.summary: Optional. Alternate list of models for routing overrides.

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterRequestDto.Sort
member.summary: Optional. Sort preference (e.g., price, throughput).

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterRequestDto.Reasoning
member.summary: Optional. Configuration for model reasoning/thinking tokens.

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterRequestDto.User
member.summary: Optional. A unique identifier representing your end-user.

member.name: T:OpenRouterClient.DTO.ReasoningDto
member.summary: Represents reasoning configuration for the request.

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.ReasoningDto.Effort
member.summary: Optional. OpenAI-style reasoning effort setting (high, medium, low).

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.ReasoningDto.MaxTokens
member.summary: Optional. Non-OpenAI-style reasoning effort setting (max tokens). Cannot be used simultaneously with effort.

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.ReasoningDto.Exclude
member.summary: Optional. Whether to exclude reasoning from the response. Defaults to false.

member.name: T:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterResponseDto
member.summary: Represents a response from the OpenRouter API for chat completions.

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterResponseDto.Id
member.summary: Optional. Unique identifier for the completion.

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterResponseDto.Choices
member.summary: Optional. List of completion choices.

member.name: T:OpenRouterClient.Services.ChatCompletionService
member.summary: Service responsible for sending chat completion requests to the OpenRouter API.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Services.ChatCompletionService.CreateChatAsync(OpenRouterClient.DTO.OpenRouterRequestDto)
member.summary: Sends a chat completion request to the OpenRouter API and returns the response.
member.param: The request object containing all parameters for the OpenRouter model.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the which includes the generated model response and related metadata.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Services.HttpRequestService._PostRequestAsync``2(``0)
member.summary: Sends an asynchronous HTTP POST request with a JSON body and deserializes the response.
member.typeparam: The type of the request DTO.
The type of the expected response DTO.
member.param: The request data transfer object containing the request payload.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the deserialized response, or null if an error occurred.

member.name: M:OpenRouterClient.Services.HttpRequestService._GetRequestAsync``2(``0)
member.summary: Sends an asynchronous HTTP Get request with a JSON body and deserializes the response.
member.typeparam: The type of the request DTO.
The type of the expected response DTO.
member.param: The request data transfer object containing the request payload.
member.returns: A task that represents the asynchronous operation. The task result contains the deserialized response, or null if an error occurred.

member.name: P:OpenRouterClient.Services.ServiceOrchestrator.ChatCompletionService
member.summary: Service responsible for sending chat completion requests to the OpenRouter API.

member.name: P:ChoiceDto.Message
member.summary: Optional. The message generated by the model.

member.name: T:Client
member.summary: Represents the main client for interacting with the OpenRouter API. Initializes global configuration and provides access to chat completion requests.

member.name: M:Client.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified API URL and token.
member.param: The base URL of the OpenRouter API.
The API token used for authentication.

member.name: P:Client.Chat
member.summary: Gets or sets the chat completion request builder.
